ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "date_listed" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" TEXT /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sqft_living" INTEGER /* Living area square footage */,
  "sqft_lot" INTEGER /* Lot size square footage */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors */,
  "waterfront" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a waterfront view */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., listed, sold, under contract) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning information of the property */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "lot_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the lot */,
  "view" TEXT /* Type of view */,
  "hoa_fees" TEXT /* Monthly HOA fees, if applicable */,
  "hoa_name" TEXT /* Name of the HOA, if applicable */,
  "property_tax" TEXT /* Annual property tax */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who listed the property */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Whether the property type is residential */,
  "is_commercial" INTEGER /* Whether the property type is commercial */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price for properties of this type */,
  "average_sqft" INTEGER /* Average square footage for properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of the amenity (e.g., indoor, outdoor, building) */,
  "amenity_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the amenity, if applicable */,
  "amenity_usage" TEXT /* Usage restrictions or rules for the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the company */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Agent's commission rate */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales amount generated by the agent */,
  "total_properties_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of properties sold by the agent */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Agent's rating (e.g., based on client reviews) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent representing the client */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the client was added to the system */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Client's preferred contact method (e.g., email, phone, text) */,
  "budget_range_min" TEXT /* Minimum budget range of the client */,
  "budget_range_max" TEXT /* Maximum budget range of the client */,
  "preferred_location" TEXT /* Preferred location of the client */,
  "preferred_property_type" TEXT /* Preferred property type of the client */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date the client was last contacted */,
  "next_contact_date" TEXT /* Planned date for the next contact with the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Client's status (e.g., active, inactive, interested, not interested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewings" (
  "viewing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client viewing the property */,
  "viewing_date" TEXT /* Date of the viewing */,
  "viewing_time" TEXT /* Time of the viewing */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who scheduled the viewing */,
  "viewing_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the viewing (e.g., client feedback, agent observations) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the viewing (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client purchasing the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price of the sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, mortgage, lease) */,
  "mortgage_loan_amount" TEXT /* Mortgage loan amount, if applicable */,
  "down_payment" TEXT /* Down payment amount, if applicable */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Closing date of the sale */,
  "sale_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sale (e.g., special conditions, post-sale follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
